prompts.name: Best Friends
prompts.text: Show two subjects as close friends with relaxed body language, warm expressions, natural spacing, and believable emotional connection.

prompts.name: Siblings
prompts.text: Show the subjects as siblings with familiar comfort, subtle shared traits, casual posture, and grounded family warmth.

prompts.name: Teacher and Student
prompts.text: Show a respectful teacher-and-student dynamic with guidance, attention, classroom or learning context, and clear roles.

prompts.name: Mentor and Apprentice
prompts.text: Show a mentor guiding an apprentice with focused attention, shared tools or setting, and a sense of learning.

prompts.name: Rivals
prompts.text: Show two subjects as rivals with confident posture, competitive energy, strong eye contact, and balanced tension.

prompts.name: Team Members
prompts.text: Show subjects as team members working together with coordinated poses, shared purpose, and cooperative energy.

prompts.name: Guardian
prompts.text: Show one subject protectively watching over another with calm strength, gentle distance, and protective body language.

prompts.name: Reunion
prompts.text: Create a reunion moment with emotional warmth, softened expressions, open posture, and a sense of relief.

prompts.name: Farewell
prompts.text: Create a farewell between subjects using restrained emotion, meaningful distance, subtle gestures, and quiet atmosphere.

prompts.name: First Meeting
prompts.text: Show a first meeting between subjects with curiosity, cautious warmth, eye contact, and a sense of new possibility.

prompts.name: Partners
prompts.text: Show subjects as reliable partners with mutual trust, coordinated posture, and shared focus.

prompts.name: Rescue Moment
prompts.text: Show a rescue moment with protective action, concern, controlled urgency, and clear emotional stakes.

prompts.name: Caregiver
prompts.text: Show a caregiver dynamic with gentle attention, calm support, and considerate body language.

prompts.name: Friend Group
prompts.text: Show a small friend group with varied personalities, natural spacing, and lively social energy.

prompts.name: Quiet Support
prompts.text: Show quiet emotional support through subtle gestures, gentle proximity, and soft reassuring expression.
